LADEN ABT 12KTS ABT 20MT IFO+ABT 0.1MT LSMGO /
BALLAST ABT 12KTS ABT 18.5MT IFO+ABT 0.1MT LSMGO
ABOVE CONSUMPTIONS INCLUDE MAIN ENGINE AND AUX.ENGINE CONSUMPTION
S.
CONSUMPTION IN PORT (IN ECA PORT CONSUMPTIONS WILL BE IN LSMGO)
DAILY CONSUMPTION BASIS GEARS WORKING: ABT4.5MT LSFO+ABT 0.1MT LSMGO
IDLE (ANCHORED/STANDBY): ABT 2.5MT LSFO+ABT 0.1MT LSMGO
ADDITIONAL 4.5 MT VLSFO DAILY FOR BALLAST/DEBALLAST
ADDITIONAL 1.5MT IFO 380CST DAILY FOR BOILER CONSUMPTION WITH TEMPERA
TURE LESS THAN 10 DEGREE CENTIGRADE.
(A) AVERAGE SPEED AND AVERAGE CONSUMPTION TO BE CALCULATED FROM SEA
BUOY TO SEA BUOY EXCLUDING PERIODS OF SLOW STEAMING
ON CHARTERERS ORDER OR FOR REASONS OF SAFETY OR STANDING BY OR
ASSISTING ANOTHER VESSEL IN DISTRESS.(B) SPEED AND CONSUMPTION BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS. GOOD
WEATHER DEFINITION AS PER OWNERS CP, EXTRAPOLATION OF
“
GOOD WEATHER
”
PERFORMANCE FOR
“
BAD WE ATHER
”
PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
(C)VESL MAY BURN SMALL QTYS OF LSMGO WHEN MANEUVERING IN
SHALLOW&NARROW WATERS ENTERING/LEAVING PORTS/IN HEAVY WEATHER
/CANAL/RIVER/BALLAST/DEBALLAST ETC.
(D) 0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE
TO BE APPLIED FOR SPEED ASSESSMENT, 5%
ALLOWANCE FOR OWNER TO BE APPLIED TO BUNKER CONSUMPTION.
(E) BUNKER SAVING TO OFFSET ANY TIME LOST AND VICE VERSA.
(F) BUNKER SUPPLIED BEING OF ISO8217:2017 (E) SPECIFICATION, OR 2010, IF 2017
IS NOT AVAILABLE
